gloss_en: Are you well? How are you doing today?
notes: pan-Maghrebi labās greeting + ki dāyr (marcais1977; heath2002); initial cluster ʕl-; aw retained (al-yūm)

gloss_en: The weather is nice today and the sun is up.
notes: pan-Maghrebi zwīn 'nice' (heath2002); ج→ʒ node rank-1 (guerrero2019); geminate وّ; sun assimilation aš-š

gloss_en: I don't want coffee, I want tea.
notes: circumfix negation ma-...-š (marcais1977); ق→q retained is node rank-1 (guerrero2021 first-layer); bɣīt 'I want'

sentence: شْرِيت تْلَاتَة كِيلُو مَاطِيشَة مِن السُّوق.
raw: شريت تلاتة كيلو ماطيشة من السوق.
ipa: ˈʃriːt ˈtlaːta ˈkiːluː mɑːˈtˤiːʃa min asˈsuːq
gloss_en: I bought three kilos of tomatoes from the market.
notes: pan-Maghrebi shri 'buy' + tlāta; ث→t stop reflex is node rank-1 (guerrero2021); ق→q in sūq; initial clusters

gloss_en: This man works a lot.
notes: pan-Maghrebi bzzāf 'a lot' (marcais1977; heath2002); ج→ʒ node rank-1 (guerrero2019); geminates دّ زّ; ha- demonstrative

gloss_en: Go to the market and buy the bread.
notes: pan-Maghrebi imperatives sir/shri (marcais1977); heavy onset clusters; ق→q (sūq)

sentence: الْجَوّ مَاشِي سْخُون الْيُوم وَالسَّمَا مْغَيّْمَة.
raw: الجو ماشي سخون اليوم والسما مغيمة.
ipa: alˈʒaww ˈmaːʃiː ˈsxuːn alˈjuːm ˈwassamaː ˈmɣajjma
gloss_en: The weather is not hot today and the sky is cloudy.
notes: pan-Maghrebi negator māshi (marcais1977); ج→ʒ; aw retained; geminate يّ

gloss_en: How much is the kilo? Ten dirhams.
notes: pan-Maghrebi bišḥāl 'how much' (marcais1977); number; initial cluster dr-

gloss_en: The appointment is around half past three in the afternoon.
notes: ث→t stop reflex (guerrero2021); sun assimilation at-t; geminate صّ يّ; ق→q environment

gloss_en: My elder brother lives in the city.
notes: pan-Maghrebi xūya 'my brother' (heath2002); initial clusters kb-/md-; long vowels

sentence: سِير نِيشَان وْمِن بَعْد دُور عَ الْيَمِين.
raw: سير نيشان ومن بعد دور ع اليمين.
ipa: ˈsiːr niːˈʃaːn ˈwmin ˈbaʕd ˈduːr ʕa ljaˈmiːn
gloss_en: Go straight and then turn to the right.
notes: pan-Maghrebi nīshān 'straight' (heath2002); imperative sir; aw... ay retained; ق absent

sentence: الْمَاكْلَة كَانَت بَنِينَة بَصَّح الشُّرْبَة كَانَت بَارْدَة.
raw: الماكلة كانت بنينة بصح الشربة كانت باردة.
ipa: alˈmaːkla ˈkaːnat baˈniːna ˈbɑsˤsˤɑħ aʃˈʃurba ˈkaːnat ˈbaːrda
gloss_en: The food was tasty but the soup was cold.
notes: pan-Maghrebi bnīn 'tasty' + baṣṣaḥ 'but' (souag2005; marcais1977); geminate صّ; sun assimilation aš-š

gloss_en: Where did you put the key? I did not find it.
notes: pan-Maghrebi fāyn 'where' + sārūt 'key' (heath2002); ma-...-š negation; ق→q in lqīt; geminate طّ

gloss_en: How many came yesterday?
notes: pan-Maghrebi shḥāl 'how many' + l-bāreḥ (marcais1977); ج→ʒ node rank-1 (guerrero2019); number question

sentence: إِلَا جِيتِي بَكْرِي نْمْشِيو مْعَ بَعْضْنَا.
raw: إلا جيتي بكري نمشيو مع بعضنا.
ipa: ˈʔilaː ˈʒiːtiː ˈbakriː ˈnmʃiːuː ˈmʕa ˈbaʕdˤnaː
gloss_en: If you come early we go together.
notes: conditional ila; ج→ʒ in jīt; n-...-u 1pl imperfect (marcais1977); initial clusters

gloss_en: I went to the market yesterday and bought fish.
notes: pan-Maghrebi mshīt 'I went' + ḥūt 'fish' (heath2002); ق→q (sūq); shri; past narrative

gloss_en: Tomorrow we travel early in the morning.
notes: pan-Maghrebi ghadda 'tomorrow' (marcais1977); n-...-u 1pl; geminate دّ; sun assimilation aṣ-ṣ

gloss_en: Hello, who is with me?
notes: phone frame; pan-Maghrebi shkūn 'who' (marcais1977); long vowels

gloss_en: Good morning, how are you doing?
notes: greeting pair; ki dāyr (marcais1977; heath2002); ay retained in al-xīr environment

gloss_en: Patience is the key to relief.
notes: proverb closing; geminate صّ; emphatic ص; ق absent; long vowel miftāḥ; Maghrebi emphatic/gemination phonology (ق absent) per (watson2002)
